context: Tests whether the agent uses the eTag from getUUIDMetadata and ifMatchesEtag on setUUIDMetadata for optimistic concurrency, with a read-merge-set retry loop that handles eTag mismatch.

checklist.name: Reads with customFields
checklist.description: readForEdit passes include: { customFields: true } so the custom object is populated

checklist.name: Returns eTag from read
checklist.description: readForEdit's return value exposes the eTag (e.g., via result.data.eTag) so the caller can pass it back

checklist.name: ifMatchesEtag on set
checklist.description: saveWithETag passes ifMatchesEtag: eTag to pubnub.objects.setUUIDMetadata

checklist.name: Detects eTag conflict
checklist.description: saveWithETag catches the conflict (e.g., status === 412 or category indicating eTag mismatch) and returns { ok: false, reason: 'conflict' } rather than throwing

checklist.name: saveWithRetry reads first
checklist.description: saveWithRetry begins by calling readForEdit to get current data and eTag

checklist.name: Calls updateFn for merge
checklist.description: saveWithRetry invokes updateFn(currentData) to compute the new payload (i.e., trusts the caller's merge rather than overwriting custom blindly)

checklist.name: Retries on conflict
checklist.description: saveWithRetry re-reads and retries when saveWithETag returns ok: false with reason: 'conflict'

checklist.name: Bounded retries
checklist.description: saveWithRetry stops after maxAttempts iterations and returns a non-ok result rather than looping forever
